violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket Found with 0ppm Chlorine. COS to 100ppm.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Drain lines at 3 cop sink are leaking.
